description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display on the front, featuring a centered punch-hole camera at the top. The back is finished in a matte lavender color with a contrasting bronze camera module housing three vertically aligned lenses in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible buttons on the right edge for power and volume control. The device has a sleek, minimalist design with rounded corners and a flat profile. The screen displays a soft, abstract wallpaper in shades of purple and blue, giving it a contemporary look. No external case or cover is present, and the branding is not visible.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a lavender matte back, bronze camera module, and a large edge-to-edge display showing an abstract wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large display with a centered punch-hole camera and an abstract purple-blue wallpaper.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the slim metallic edge and the placement of physical buttons.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the matte lavender finish and the triple camera array in a bronze module at the top left.
description_view_3: Left side view shows the uninterrupted metallic edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an abstract wallpaper with swirling shades of purple, blue, and white, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses are vertically aligned in a bronze module at the top left corner on the back. A single front-facing camera is centered at the top of the display in a punch-hole cutout.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are located on the right edge, including a power button and a volume rocker.
